mapper.sql: ARTICLE_ID AS articleId, TITLE AS title, SUMMARY AS summary, COVER_IMAGE_ID AS coverImageId, CATEGORY AS category, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 3 AND CATEGORY = #{category}

SELECT FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 3 AND (TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR SUMMARY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY PUBLISHED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 3 AND (TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR SUMMARY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT ARTICLE_ID AS articleId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, SUMMARY AS summary, COVER_IMAGE_ID AS coverImageId, CATEGORY AS category, STATUS AS status, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt, REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason FROM ARTICLES WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLES SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, SUMMARY = #{summary}, COVER_IMAGE_ID = #{coverImageId}, CATEGORY = #{category}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
UPDATE ARTICLES SET DEL_FLAG = 1, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT , STATUS AS status FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 2 ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = 2
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLES SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTICLE_FAVORITES (FAV_ID, USER_ID, ARTICLE_ID, IS_ACTIVE, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{favId}, #{userId}, #{articleId}, #{isActive}, 0, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE IS_ACTIVE = #{isActive}, UPDATED_AT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT IS_ACTIVE FROM ARTICLE_FAVORITES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT a.ARTICLE_ID AS articleId, a.TITLE AS title, a.SUMMARY AS summary, a.COVER_IMAGE_ID AS coverImageId, a.CATEGORY AS category, a.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, a.PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt FROM ARTICLE_FAVORITES f JOIN ARTICLES a ON a.ARTICLE_ID = f.ARTICLE_ID WHERE f.USER_ID = #{userId} AND f.IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND f.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND a.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY f.UPDATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTICLE_FAVORITES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLES SET STATUS = #{status}, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason}, PUBLISHED_AT = CASE WHEN #{status} = 3 THEN NOW() ELSE PUBLISHED_AT END, REVIEWED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTICLES WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND STATUS = #{status}
AND (TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR SUMMARY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLES SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
UPDATE ARTICLES SET COVER_IMAGE_ID = #{coverImageId}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
UPDATE ARTICLES SET FAVORITE_COUNT = GREATEST(FAVORITE_COUNT + #{delta}, 0), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.select: SELECT TAG_NAME FROM ARTICLE_TAGS WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLE_TAGS SET DEL_FLAG = 1 WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTICLE_TAGS (TAG_ID, ARTICLE_ID, TAG_NAME, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{tagId}, #{articleId}, #{tagName}, 0, NOW())
